questions: how to save money with budgeting?
answers: Budgeting means tracking your income and expenses so you know where your money goes. Start by listing all your income sources and then all your monthly expenses.
A popular method is the 50/30/20 rule: 50% for needs, 30% for wants, and 20% for savings. It's simple and effective for beginners.
Budget korar jonno prothome tomar income lekho, then expenses list koro. Dekhbe kothay kothay taka jachhe and kothay cut korte parbe.
Good budgeting starts with being honest about your spending habits. Use apps like YNAB or Mint, or even a simple spreadsheet. The key is consistency — review your budget every week.
